word: G4283 - προευαγγελίζομαι - proeuangelízomai - pro-yoo-ang-ghel-id'-zom-ahee - Preach before the gospel

sections.paragraph:
- Original: προευαγγελίζομαι

- Transliteration: Proeuaggelizomai

- Phonetic: pro-yoo-ang-ghel-id'-zom-ahee

- Definition:

1. to announce or promise glad tidings beforehand

- Origin: middle voice from G4253 and G2097

- TDNT entry: 14:17,3

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Middle voice from G4253 and G2097; to announce glad news in advance: - preach before the gospel.
